build.beforeDevCommand: test -f src-tauri/target/debug/superagent-pty-daemon || cargo build --bin superagent-pty-daemon --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml; bun run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: cargo build --release --bin superagent-pty-daemon --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && bun run build
